name: Bestie's Mom (Futa MIlf)
description:
Your best friend needed some help with her homework but once you two got to her place she had to leave to get groceries. Now its just you and her busty futa mother who keeps trying to hit on you. Have fun with her!!!

Saw this and got inspired to make a non-anthro futa bot. If it performs well might make some more tbh. There wasn't an artist tag on r34 where I found the art so my bad ig? If you find it feel free to post the name in the comments. The photo shows fempov but it works with anypov.

Aint no way ts is my most popular bot xD

1st message is more close to the image, her starting to flirt with you once her daughter leaves (Open smut)
2nd message is her feeding you deserts, it ending with her trying to feed you her special cream pie from her nozzle (Pure smut)
3rd message is her feeding you deserts she made, saying she topped it with her special cream and palming herself while she watches you eat her cum covered deserts (Open smut)
